name: What evidence do I need for forklift injury claim at work?

mainEntity.name: What evidence do I need for forklift injury claim at work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Med records, reports, photos, witnesses; file Form 122.[2][3]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Medical records, incident reports, witness statements, photos, and expert opinions on causation.** These prove injury arose from employment.[3] Key factors: Document scene immediately, get employer report, preserve forklift maintenance logs for defects.[1][2] Videos/security footage strengthen negligence against third parties. Avoid admitting fault early.

description: Med records, reports, photos, witnesses; file Form 122.[2][3]
